name: Bevy
tagline: Artsy Kakaako cocktail bar doubling as a gallery — creative drinks, locally sourced small plates, and rotating local art.
talkStory: Opened in 2016 as part of Kakaako's creative renaissance, Bevy was one of the first bars to take the neighborhood's art scene seriously -- rotating exhibitions from local artists like Kamea Hadar line the walls. The cocktail program uses locally foraged ingredients like mamaki tea and poha berry. Happy hour 4-6pm is a neighborhood institution for Kakaako's young creative class.
